# commands

Extracts `defineCommand()` definitions from each plugin's `web/commands.ts`.
No `relate()` — commands have no cross-plugin relationships.

First facet sub-plugin, used as the reference implementation for the facet
pattern. The `Facet` interface and `defineFacet` come from `facets/core`;
parsing helpers (`parseDefineGroup`, `stripTypes`, `readIfExists`) come from
`plugin-tree/core`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Core:
  - Exports: Types: `CommandDef`; Values: `commandsFacetDef`, `commandsToComparable`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`render-catalog`** — Aggregated cross-plugin commands table in the Forge catalog.
  - **`render-detail`** — Per-plugin commands section in the plugin detail pane.
  - **`render-diff`** — Diff renderer for the commands facet (PR review).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
